### useLogger()

The `useLogger` function is a custom React Hook that is for debugging

```typescript
export declare function useLogger(componentName: string, ...rest: unknown[]): (node: any) => void;
```

#### useLogger的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  componentName | string | Component name identifier |
|  rest | unknown[] | rest parameters |

<b>返回值:</b>

(node: any) =&gt; void
